prompt.positive:
A photorealistic image-to-video continuation of the provided interior pool frame. Start exactly from the empty spa with two vertical water curtains already flowing into the illuminated turquoise pool. Preserve the stone architecture and strict verticals, the exact wall-panel and pool-tile geometry, the pool level, the living-wall foliage pattern, the round white daybed and cushions, the existing lighting, the original composition and aspect ratio.

During the four-second clip, the two water curtains maintain a smooth, even downward flow while one restrained pattern of natural ripples spreads from their visible impact areas. By the final frames, the ripples ease into a calm stable surface and the cascades remain steady.

Keep the camera locked and the original composition stable. Preserve the full main subject and all key scene elements in frame. No zoom, orbit, pan, tilt or reframing.

Existing underwater illumination and reflections shimmer subtly with the water only. Natural lighting and colors, realistic water physics, exact architectural geometry, smooth temporal consistency, stable fine details, photorealistic motion.
prompt.negative: water curtains stopping or surging, invented splashes, large waves, changing water level, moving furniture, shifted cushions, changing room layout, added openings, warped stone panels, bent verticals, drifting perspective, altered pool-tile grid, changing foliage count, invented branches, moving foliage, incoherent reflections, new light sources, changing shadow direction, exposure jumps, zoom, pan, orbit, reframing, camera shake, flicker, morphing, CGI look
